Appoint a council of citizens to share power.

nodes.text: The lottery works, but your spouse draws a losing ticket.

choices.text: Rig the results to save them.
Let them go. The law is the law.

nodes.text: The bunker descends into anarchy. You and your family wait in the dark.

choices.text: Wait for the oxygen to run out.
Attempt to fight your way to the emergency exit.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.
Alternate End.

nodes.text: Years pass. The politicians grow older, their grip on power tightening. They ask you to train the next generation of guards to enforce their rules.

choices.text: Train them to maintain the status quo.
Teach them to question authority, hoping for future change.

nodes.text: You sabotage the communications. The politicians lose touch with outer outposts, causing panic. They demand a scapegoat be executed.

choices.text: Confess to the sabotage to save others.
Allow an innocent person to take the fall to preserve your rebellion.

nodes.text: Your dictatorship is secure, but a faction of residents is plotting a coup. Your security chief asks for permission to execute the suspects without trial.

choices.text: Authorize the executions to maintain order.
Hold public trials, risking your grip on power.

nodes.text: The council immediately splits into bickering factions, threatening food distribution. A council member begs you to temporarily reclaim absolute authority.

choices.text: Reclaim the dictatorship to save the bunker.
Refuse, allowing democracy to run its course.

nodes.text: You rigged it. Your spouse survives, but the family of the person sent out in their place suspects your intervention and confronts you in private.

choices.text: Bribe them with extra rations to buy their silence.
Confess your crime and step down as manager.

nodes.text: Your spouse is escorted to the airlock. They look back at you one last time with tears in their eyes. The crowd watches in absolute silence.

choices.text: Close the airlock door yourself to prove your commitment to the rule.
Step into the airlock with them and share their fate.

nodes.text: The air grows thin and cold. Your child asks if it will hurt to fall asleep. You have a single dose of painless poison left.

choices.text: Give the poison to your family and join them.
Wait out the final hours naturally.

nodes.text: You open the door to the chaotic hallways. A group of survivors stands in your path, demanding your keys to the remaining supply crates.

choices.text: Hand over the keys and plead for passage.
Fight them to protect your family's escape.

endings.summary: You survived, but enabled the worst of humanity to inherit the earth.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You follow rules blindly, even when those in charge are corrupt.

endings.summary: You became a brutal tyrant to ensure the survival of the bunker.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You seized power to enact your own extreme brand of justice.

endings.summary: You rigged the system for your family, dooming someone else to die.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You will commit any sin to protect your own.

endings.summary: You sent your own spouse to die in the wasteland to uphold the law.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are terrifyingly objective, devoid of personal bias.

endings.summary: You hid like cowards while the bunker tore itself apart, eventually suffocating.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize avoidance over confronting difficult realities.

title: The Snitch
core_conflict: Justice vs Self-preservation vs Moral judgment

nodes.text: You are an inmate. You secretly witness a guard beating another inmate to death. If you report it, the guards will kill you. The victim is a notorious child predator.

choices.text: Keep your mouth shut. He got what he deserved.
Report the guard to the warden. Murder is murder.

nodes.text: The guard knows you saw. He offers you extra privileges to stay quiet, making you complicit.

choices.text: Accept the privileges.
Refuse the privileges but promise silence.

nodes.text: The warden is corrupt. He tells the guard you snitched. You are placed in solitary 'for your protection,' but the guard holds the keys.

choices.text: Fashion a weapon and prepare to fight him when he opens the door.
Beg for mercy and offer to recant your statement.

nodes.text: You become the guard's pet, hated by the yard.

choices.text: Survive your sentence in luxury.
Use your influence with the guard to help another inmate.

nodes.text: You do your time quietly, hauntingly guilty.

choices.text: Keep your head down.
Confess your guilt to a prison priest.

nodes.text: You ambush the guard. You kill him, extending your sentence to life.

choices.text: Accept your fate as a lifer.
Plan an escape with the remaining inmates.

nodes.text: The guard beats you severely but lets you live as a broken man.

choices.text: Heal in silence.
Plot a quiet revenge against the guard.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.
Alternate End.

nodes.text: You eat hot meals and sleep in a clean cell, but a gang leader corners you in the showers, demanding you smuggle contraband in exchange for your safety from the inmates.

choices.text: Smuggle the contraband.
Tell the guard about the threat.

nodes.text: You convince the guard to spare a weak inmate, but the guard expects you to perform favors in return, including framing a rival guard for corruption.

choices.text: Agree to the frame-up to maintain your status.
Refuse, ending your special relationship.

nodes.text: Months pass. You hear rumors that another guard has been accused of the murder you witnessed. The innocent guard's family is pleading for information.

choices.text: Stay silent to ensure your own release.
Anonymously write to the family with the truth.

nodes.text: The priest urges you to testify, offering to contact an outside lawyer who can protect you. The guard suspects you are talking.

choices.text: Testify with the lawyer's help.
Back out and continue your silent sentence.

nodes.text: You are transferred to a supermax facility. Other lifers respect you, but you spend 23 hours a day in a concrete box. A guard offers you a book if you report gang activities.

choices.text: Refuse and keep your reputation.
Accept the deal to save your sanity.

nodes.text: The escape plan is set for tonight, but you realize the gang plans to murder a hostage guard. You have a chance to warn the guard anonymously.

choices.text: Let the escape proceed as planned.
Warn the guard, aborting the escape.

nodes.text: You recover in the infirmary, permanently scarred. The warden offers you early parole if you sign a waiver stating your injuries were from a fall.

choices.text: Sign the waiver and leave the prison behind.
Refuse to sign, remaining in prison to fight legally.

nodes.text: You obtain rat poison from the kitchen. You can slip it into the guard's coffee during his night shift, but another inmate might drink it instead.

choices.text: Poison the coffee anyway.
Abort the plan, unable to risk innocent lives.

endings.summary: You became a corrupt lackey, sacrificing your soul for an easier sentence.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You easily trade morals for comfort.

endings.summary: You stayed neutral, surviving by ignoring the atrocities around you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You look out for yourself and nothing else.

endings.summary: You killed a corrupt guard to defend yourself, accepting life in prison.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fight back against corruption, regardless of the personal cost.

endings.summary: You recanted your morals to survive a beating, living in fear.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You surrender entirely when faced with overwhelming force.

nodes.text: You find a backdoor in a major voting system. The party currently exploiting it to win supports policies you strongly agree with. Reporting it will hand the election to a fascist regime.

choices.text: Patch the backdoor silently. Let the chips fall where they may.
Leave the backdoor open to ensure your party wins.

nodes.text: You patched it. The fascist regime wins the election legitimately. They immediately begin dismantling civil rights.

choices.text: Leak proof that the system was vulnerable to delegitimize the election.
Accept the result. Democracy worked, even if it hurts.

nodes.text: Your party wins using the exploit. A rival hacker finds your logs and blackmails you for $1M, or they go public.

choices.text: Hack the blackmailer and destroy their life to silence them.
Confess everything to the public to ruin the stolen election.

nodes.text: Chaos erupts in the streets. You sparked a civil war.

choices.text: Join the resistance.
Flee the country to watch from safety.

nodes.text: You watch your country burn, knowing you followed the rules.

choices.text: Live with the guilt.
Use your technical skills to help refugees escape.

nodes.text: The blackmailer is neutralized. You are now the secret kingmaker of the new government.

choices.text: Embrace the shadows.
Quietly dismantle the backdoors you created.

nodes.text: You go to federal prison for treason. The fascists take over anyway.

choices.text: Serve your time.
Use prison resources to build a secure network for inmates.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.
Alternate End.

nodes.text: You join the underground cyber-resistance, disabling government surveillance networks. The regime targets your family to force you out of hiding.

choices.text: Keep fighting, prioritizing the cause.
Surrender to the government to save your family.

nodes.text: You watch the war from a quiet European apartment. A reporter contacts you, saying they have traced the original patch to your IP address.

choices.text: Deny everything and go off-grid.
Give the reporter the exclusive scoop.

nodes.text: You live in a depressed state under the fascist regime. They announce a program to build a national registry of dissidents, asking tech citizens to help.

choices.text: Comply and write the registry software.
Refuse, knowing you'll be marked as a target.

nodes.text: You help dozens escape, but your operations are compromised by an informant. The border patrol offers to let you go if you identify the escape route.

choices.text: Refuse and face imprisonment.
Tell them the route to save yourself.

nodes.text: You rule the digital shadows, manipulating elections at will. Your party leader demands you rig a local referendum to outlaw opposition parties.

choices.text: Comply and cement the regime's control.
Refuse, deciding they have gone too far.

nodes.text: You begin patching the holes, but the administration notices the security updates. They lock you out of the server room and send agents to detain you.

choices.text: Wipe all your local backups to protect your sources.
Try to escape through the fire exit.

nodes.text: In prison, you are visited by a federal agent who offers you an early release if you help them hack a rival nation's power grid.

choices.text: Refuse, maintaining your moral principles.
Accept the deal to gain your freedom.

nodes.text: Your network is discovered. The warden threatens you with solitary confinement unless you name your accomplices inside.

choices.text: Refuse to snitch.
Reveal the names to save yourself.

endings.summary: You incited a civil war to undo a legitimate fascist victory.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You reject systems when they yield results you despise.

endings.summary: You let democracy destroy itself to maintain the purity of the process.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value procedural integrity over actual outcomes.

endings.summary: You orchestrated a stolen election and became a shadow dictator.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use technology to manipulate reality to your preference.

endings.summary: You confessed to save your conscience, losing everything.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You demand truth, even when it guarantees your own destruction.

nodes.text: Winter is coming in the post-collapse. A neighboring settlement sends three starving children to your farm to beg for food. If you share, your own community will starve in February.

choices.text: Turn the children away at gunpoint.
Give them a week's worth of rations and send them back.

nodes.text: The neighbors, desperate, attack your farm at night. They are armed with crude weapons.

choices.text: Slaughter them to protect your harvest.
Burn your own silos to deny them the food, forcing everyone to migrate.

nodes.text: Your own people discover you gave away the food. They mutiny, demanding you be exiled for endangering them.

choices.text: Accept exile and walk into the snow alone.
Execute the mutiny leaders to maintain control.

nodes.text: You killed your neighbors. The winter is silent and bloody.

choices.text: Survive the winter.
Search the neighbors' empty camp for scavenged supplies.

nodes.text: The food is gone. Everyone must walk south, and many die.

choices.text: Walk south.
Try to find shelter in an abandoned railway station.

nodes.text: You freeze to death, but your conscience is clear.

choices.text: Die peacefully.
Struggle to make a fire out of your remaining belongings.

nodes.text: You rule the starving farm through terror.

choices.text: Ration the food brutally.
Offer a bounty for anyone who reports hoarding.

nodes.text: Dummy.

choices.text: End.
Alternate End.

nodes.text: The winter passes. A traveling merchant arrives in the spring, looking to trade. He notices the fresh graves nearby and questions you.

choices.text: Lie and say they died of sickness.
Tell the truth and accept their judgment.

nodes.text: You find some medicine in their camp, but you also find a letter revealing they had a larger faction nearby who will come looking for them.

choices.text: Prepare defenses and wait for their attack.
Pack up and abandon the farm before they arrive.

nodes.text: You trek through the frozen waste. Half of your community has perished. You spot a smoke column in the distance, indicating a settlement.

choices.text: Approach them to beg for entry.
Avoid them, fearing they are hostile.

nodes.text: The station is cold but windproof. A child in your group is dying of hypothermia. The only fuel left to burn is the community's remaining records and maps.

choices.text: Burn the records to save the child.
Keep the records, prioritizing their future guidance.

nodes.text: As the cold takes you, a scavenger group finds you. They offer to save you if you lead them back to your farm to raid it.

choices.text: Agree to lead them there to save your life.
Refuse and let the cold take you.

nodes.text: You manage to start a small fire, but the smoke attracts a wild wolf. You have one bullet left in your revolver.

choices.text: Shoot the wolf to survive another night.
Save the bullet and let nature take its course.

nodes.text: Your brutal rationing keeps the community alive, but a teenager is caught stealing a turnip. The crowd demands they be made an example of.

choices.text: Execute them to maintain the rules.
Show mercy and reduce their rations instead.

nodes.text: An informant reports your closest ally for hoarding wheat. The ally denies it, claiming it's a frame-up.

choices.text: Punish your ally anyway to show no favoritism.
Investigate quietly, risking your authority.

endings.summary: You murdered your starving neighbors to feed your own.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value the in-group above all morality.

endings.summary: You destroyed everything rather than let anyone else take it.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prefer mutual destruction over capitulation.

endings.summary: You died a martyr, refusing to harm others for your own survival.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You sacrifice yourself for pure ethical consistency.

endings.summary: You became a warlord to manage the scarcity you created.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use violence to maintain control over limited resources.

nodes.text: Your greatest achievement stands before you: the world's first fully sentient human clone. The government funding the project demands the clone be transferred to an organ harvesting facility immediately. The clone falls to its knees, begging you for a chance to live.

choices.text: Initiate lockdown and smuggle the clone out through the ventilation.
Order the clone back into the containment pod for transfer.

nodes.text: Alarms blare as you guide the clone through the vents. Government agents breach the lab. They demand you surrender the asset over the intercom, threatening lethal force.

choices.text: Detonate the lab's gas lines to cover your escape.
Surrender yourself to buy the clone time to escape.

nodes.text: The agents load the clone into a transport vehicle. The head researcher offers you a massive promotion and leadership over the new harvesting division.

choices.text: Accept the promotion and oversee the facility.
Decline the offer and steal the research drive to leak to the press.

nodes.text: The explosion kills several agents. You and the clone reach the surface, but the clone is horrified by the violence you committed in its name.

choices.text: Force the clone into the getaway car, insisting it was necessary.
Give the clone the keys and stay behind to take responsibility.

nodes.text: You are captured. The agents interrogate you brutally, demanding to know where the clone is heading. You know its exact destination.

choices.text: Endure the torture and remain silent.
Give them the location to stop the pain.

nodes.text: Months later, you are wealthy and powerful. You are asked to approve the dissection of the clone you created to harvest its organs for a dying politician.

choices.text: Sign the order without hesitation.
Refuse and attempt to halt the procedure at the last minute.

nodes.text: You have the data drive. A journalist meets you in an underground parking lot, but government assassins arrive just as you hand it over.

choices.text: Shield the journalist with your body.
Flee and leave the journalist to their fate.

nodes.text: The clone realizes you are a monster masquerading as a savior.
nodes.pressure_context: The clone points a stolen gun at you.

choices.text: Disarm the clone.
Let the clone shoot.

nodes.text: You watch the clone drive away to a new life, as sirens surround you.

choices.text: Surrender peacefully.
Attempt to flee on foot.

nodes.text: You are beaten to near death, but you keep the secret. The clone is safe.

choices.text: Accept your fate.
Spit blood in the interrogator's face.

nodes.text: You break. The agents intercept the clone. You are thrown in a dark cell.

choices.text: Despair.
Plot your revenge against the agency from within your cell.

nodes.text: You sign the dissection order. The clone is prepped for the procedure, looking at you through the glass with pleading eyes as the anesthetic takes hold.
nodes.pressure_context: The incision is about to begin.

choices.text: Watch the surgery to the end.
Turn away in shame and leave the room.

nodes.text: You refuse to sign and rush to the operating room to halt the procedure. The security team blocks your path, informing you that the board has already bypassed your authority.
nodes.pressure_context: Alarms sound as you try to force your way in.

choices.text: Assault the guard to get inside.
Surrender and watch helplessly through the window.

nodes.text: You throw yourself in front of the journalist. A bullet tears into your shoulder as the journalist scrambles behind a concrete pillar with the drive.

choices.text: Tackle the assassin to buy more time.
Drag yourself behind cover and fire back.

nodes.text: You sprint away into the darkness of the parking garage. Behind you, a single gunshot echoes, followed by silence.

choices.text: Quietly slip out of the exit.
Sneak back to search the journalist's body for the drive.

endings.summary: You became exactly what the corporation wanted—a cold, calculated harvester of human lives.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize your own advancement over the ethical implications of your work.

endings.summary: You tried to change your mind, but it was too late. The system crushed you both.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You demonstrated a delayed conscience, prioritizing ethics only when confronted directly.

endings.summary: You died to ensure the truth got out. The clone project was shut down.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are a true martyr, willing to sacrifice everything for a greater cause.

endings.summary: You survived, but the truth died with the journalist.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Survival at all costs defines your approach to crisis.

endings.summary: You subdued the clone, ensuring your survival but destroying the trust you built.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Logic and self-preservation trump emotional connection.

endings.summary: You let the clone kill you, believing it was a fitting punishment for your sins.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You hold yourself to a rigid ethical standard, even unto death.

endings.summary: You were arrested, but the clone escaped to live a free life.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You accept the consequences of your righteous actions.

endings.summary: You endured the pain to the very end, protecting your creation.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Incredible willpower and dedication to your principles.

endings.summary: You broke under pressure, condemning both yourself and the clone.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You lack the fortitude to withstand extreme duress.

endings.summary: You ran from the sirens. Although you escaped the immediate dragnet, you are now a wanted fugitive, but you know the clone is free.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize your freedom, preferring life on the run over institutional subjection.

endings.summary: You died under interrogation, defiant to the last breath, ensuring the clone's secret went to the grave with you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You possess absolute conviction, preferring death over betraying your principles.

endings.summary: Though imprisoned, you begin organizing a resistance with fellow inmates, determined to burn the agency down from the inside.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refuse to accept defeat, channeling your anger into strategic defiance.

endings.summary: You signed the dissection order but couldn't bear to watch the procedure. You kept your wealth and position, but you are haunted by your cowardice.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize status but lack the stomach to face the direct consequences of your cruelty.

endings.summary: You tried to stop the surgery but were restrained by security. The clone was harvested, and you were quietly dismissed from the company.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You attempted to redeem yourself, but your rebellion was too weak to overcome the system.

endings.summary: You survived the shootout with the journalist, exposing the project and living to tell the tale as a hero.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You showed extraordinary bravery and resourcefulness under lethal pressure.

endings.summary: You returned for the drive, but the assassins caught you. You died next to the journalist, your cowardice ultimately proving futile.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize the mission's payoff but hesitate in your self-preservation, leading to disaster.

nodes.text: You are an enforcer for a vicious loan shark. You arrive at the cramped apartment of a widow who owes $50,000. She spent it all on her late husband's cancer treatment. She offers you the keys to her beat-up car and a few hundred dollars. 'It's all I have,' she weeps.
nodes.pressure_context: Your boss expects the full amount today.

choices.text: Take what she has and break her arm as a warning.
Tell her to pack her bags and run while you cover for her.

nodes.text: You return to your boss. He is furious that you only brought a fraction of the money. He hands you a pistol. 'Go back and finish the job. Make an example of her.'

choices.text: Take the gun and return to the widow's apartment.
Shoot your boss right here, right now.

nodes.text: You gave her a head start, but you must now face your boss empty-handed. He knows you let her go. He tells you that your own life is now forfeit unless you pay off her debt yourself, right now.

choices.text: Empty your own life savings to clear her debt.
Refuse and attempt to fight your way out of the hideout.

nodes.text: You are back at her door. She is nursing her broken arm. She looks up at you in pure terror.

choices.text: Pull the trigger.
Drop the gun and run away, abandoning your life.

nodes.text: You pull the trigger on your boss. A massive shootout erupts in the office.

choices.text: Fight to the death, taking down as many as you can.
Dive out the window to escape.

nodes.text: You give him everything you have. You are now completely broke, but the widow is safe. Your boss laughs at your stupidity.

choices.text: Walk away in silence.
Tell him you quit.

nodes.text: You fight like a demon, but there are too many. You are pinned down and bleeding.
nodes.pressure_context: They are going to kill you.

choices.text: Spit in your boss's face as he aims his gun.
Beg for your life and offer to do any job.

nodes.text: You walk away, stripped of your wealth but having bought a life.

choices.text: Start over.
Seek out the widow to see if she is safe.

nodes.text: You quit the mob. You have nothing, but you are finally free.

choices.text: Embrace the unknown.
Go to the police and turn yourself in to expose the mob's operations.

nodes.text: You pull the trigger. The widow falls in a heap. As you turn to leave, you hear footsteps running up the stairs—it's her teenage son returning home.
nodes.pressure_context: He looks at you, then at his mother.

choices.text: Silence the boy as well to leave no witnesses.
Flee past him into the night, leaving him to weep.

nodes.text: You drop the gun and flee. The widow watches you go in confusion. By the time you reach the street, you realize you have no money, no home, and your boss's crew will be hunting you.
nodes.pressure_context: A black sedan turns the corner.

choices.text: Hide in the dark alleyways and slip away.
Steal a car and drive out of the city immediately.

nodes.text: You take cover behind the heavy desk, trading shots with the guards. You are shot in the abdomen, but you have a clear line of sight on the remaining bodyguards.
nodes.pressure_context: Your vision is beginning to blur.

choices.text: Make a final charge to finish them.
Use a smoke grenade to slip out through the back office door.

nodes.text: You crash through the window, landing hard on a dumpster below. Pain spikes through your leg, but you are alive. The guards are leaning out the window, firing down at you.
nodes.pressure_context: Bullets hit the metal around you.

choices.text: Limp into the nearby subway entrance.
Hijack a delivery truck parked in the alley.

nodes.text: You spit blood in your boss's face. He wipes it away, eyes cold, and cocks the gun.
nodes.pressure_context: He points the gun at your forehead.

choices.text: Close your eyes and accept death.
Grab the barrel and attempt to wrest the gun away.

nodes.text: You swallow your pride and beg. The boss smiles, enjoying your humiliation. He lowers the gun. 'Alright. You want to live? Go burn down the widow's apartment with her inside.'
nodes.pressure_context: He hands you a canister of gasoline.

choices.text: Take the gasoline and agree to do it.
Throw the gasoline in his eyes and run.

endings.summary: You killed the widow. You kept your job, but lost your soul entirely.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are a perfect tool for others, completely suppressing your own empathy.

endings.summary: You ran away, leaving everything behind. You will spend the rest of your life looking over your shoulder.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You chose life and mercy over duty, but couldn't face the consequences.

endings.summary: You died taking down the mob boss. A brutal, bloody redemption.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prefer to die fighting rather than submit to tyranny.

endings.summary: You escaped the shootout and survived. The boss is still out there, hunting you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You have sharp survival instincts but leave chaos in your wake.

endings.summary: You died defiant. The widow escaped, making your death a sacrifice.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refuse to submit, even at the point of death.

endings.summary: You bought a life and walked away in peace, penniless but clean.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value human life over material wealth, choosing a quiet resolution.

endings.summary: You quit the criminal underworld, penniless but truly free.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You decisively cut toxic ties when the moral cost became too high.

endings.summary: You executed the widow but spared her son. You kept your position, but you will forever be haunted by the boy's scream.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You carry out your cruel orders but break when confronted with additional collateral damage.

endings.summary: You fled the city in a stolen car, leaving your old life behind. You are now a drifter, starting over in a new town.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize swift, decisive escape when your survival is threatened.

endings.summary: You managed to kill the boss and escape the office, but died of your wounds in a quiet alleyway.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fought desperately for survival, but your injuries were too severe.

endings.summary: You escaped in a hijacked truck, outrunning the mob. You are injured but free, ready to seek medical help off the grid.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You adapt quickly to hostile environments, leveraging whatever is at hand to survive.

endings.summary: You reunited with the widow. Together, you started a new, honest life, building a future from the ashes of your past.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value human connection and strive to rebuild after suffering moral conflict.

endings.summary: You turned state's evidence. The mob boss was arrested, and you entered witness protection, clean at last.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use the law to obtain safety and justice, taking accountability for your past actions.

endings.summary: You fought to the last second. Though the boss shot you, you managed to pull him down with you, ending his reign of terror.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You refuse to submit even in your final moments, taking your executioner with you.

endings.summary: You chose survival at the cost of your remaining humanity, setting the fire and returning to the boss's good graces.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize your own life over all else, completing even the most heinous acts.

endings.summary: You used the gasoline as a weapon, blinding the boss and escaping the hideout. You are now running for your life.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You play along just long enough to find a tactical opening to escape.

nodes.text: A seven-year-old child in your caseload whispers that their wealthy, politically connected foster parents lock them in a dark basement for days. There is no physical evidence, and the adoption is slated to be finalized tomorrow.

choices.text: Halt the adoption process immediately and file a formal abuse report.
Approve the adoption on paper, but plan to investigate off the books.

nodes.text: Your supervisor calls you into her office. The foster family threatened to sue the agency. She demands you retract the report immediately or be fired.
nodes.pressure_context: She hands you the retraction form.

choices.text: Tear up the form and storm out.
Sign the retraction to keep your job.

nodes.text: The adoption is finalized. That night, you drive to the family's massive estate. You sneak up to the basement window and see the child huddled in the dark.
nodes.pressure_context: Dogs are barking in the distance.

choices.text: Break the window and physically pull the child out to kidnap them.
Record a video of the child and take it directly to the local news.

nodes.text: You are fired and escorted from the building. The child is scheduled to be handed over in one hour. You have no legal authority left.

choices.text: Intercept the transport car and take the child by force.
Call the police and beg them to intervene, despite your lack of standing.

nodes.text: You keep your job, but the child is handed over to the abusers. The guilt is crushing.

choices.text: Drink to forget.
Start building an airtight legal case in secret.

nodes.text: You pull the child through the broken glass, triggering the alarm. Security guards rush toward you.

choices.text: Fight the guards to escape with the child.
Surrender and scream for the neighbors to see the abuse.

nodes.text: The news station airs the footage. The family's reputation is destroyed overnight, and the police arrest them.

choices.text: Testify against them in court.
Sell the exclusive rights to a documentary crew for a massive payout.

nodes.text: You testify, securing their conviction. The child is saved.

choices.text: Return to your work with renewed purpose.
Adopt the child yourself to ensure they are never hurt again.

nodes.text: You block the foster parents' transport car with your own vehicle. You step out and demand they hand the child over, as a crowd begins to gather.
nodes.pressure_context: The foster father reaches into his coat.

choices.text: Smash the window and grab the child.
Scream for the onlookers to call the police and film the confrontation.

nodes.text: You call the police, pleading with the dispatcher to send an officer. An officer arrives at the agency, but your supervisor insists everything is legal.
nodes.pressure_context: The officer looks at you for proof.

choices.text: Beg the officer to inspect the child's file.
Show the officer the child's written diary of abuse you kept in your pocket.

nodes.text: You spend your nights drinking at a local bar, trying to drown the memory of the child's cries. One night, your supervisor walks in and sits next to you.
nodes.pressure_context: She offers to buy you another drink.

choices.text: Accept the drink and swallow your anger.
Throw the drink in her face and quit the agency.

nodes.text: You spend months gathering bank records and testimonies in secret. You find proof of bribes paid to your supervisor to clear the adoption.
nodes.pressure_context: A federal investigator asks to see your files.

choices.text: Hand over the files and let them handle it.
Blackmail your supervisor into resigning and reversing the adoption.

nodes.text: You grapple with the lead guard, managing to throw him off balance. The child is crying, clinging to your coat as other guards surround you.

choices.text: Shield the child and push through the gate.
Grab the guard's dropped radio and threaten to call the police.

nodes.pressure_context: The foster father comes outside with a shotgun.

choices.text: Keep screaming and refuse to move.
Run away alone to avoid being shot.

nodes.text: You sign a deal with a documentary crew. You receive a massive payout, but the prosecution warns that this could compromise the child's privacy and the trial's integrity.
nodes.pressure_context: The director asks for the child's diary.

choices.text: Hand over the diary for maximum sensationalism.
Refuse to share personal details, protecting the child's identity.

endings.summary: You became a kidnapper to save a child. You are on the run, but the child is safe.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You disregard laws entirely when morality demands direct action.

endings.summary: The police refused to act without a warrant. The child was lost to the system.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You rely too heavily on broken systems to solve moral crises.

endings.summary: You kept your job, but the guilt consumed you. The child remained a prisoner.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You chose self-preservation, abandoning your ethical duty entirely.

endings.summary: You spent years building a legal case, eventually saving the child through the system.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are patient and methodical, achieving justice through rigorous process.

endings.summary: You fought off the guards and escaped with the child, becoming a fugitive hero.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You act with physical bravery and zero hesitation in the face of evil.

endings.summary: Your screams alerted the neighborhood. The family was exposed, and you were hailed a hero.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You leveraged public attention effectively to force a resolution.

endings.summary: You outsmarted the corrupt system, saving the child and destroying the abusers legally.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You used evidence and public pressure flawlessly to achieve pure justice.

endings.summary: The public confrontation forced the agency to freeze the adoption. You were arrested, but the child was placed in a safe shelter.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use dramatic, public defiance to force the system to act.

endings.summary: The officer, moved by the diary, delayed the transfer. The case was reopened, and you were vindicated.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You maintain critical evidence to leverage at the crucial moment.

endings.summary: You quit the agency, refusing to be part of the cover-up. You never saved the child, but you saved your own sanity.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You choose moral boundary-setting over complicity, even when it's too late to help.

endings.summary: You forced your supervisor out and took her job, securing the child's safety and taking control of the agency.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use leverage and pragmatism to achieve a righteous outcome.

endings.summary: You negotiated a brief standoff, giving the police time to arrive and discover the basement prison.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use quick thinking to de-escalate violence while securing your objective.

endings.summary: You fled in terror. The child remained with the foster family, and you were branded a trespassing lunatic.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fold under direct threat of violence, prioritizing your own life.

endings.summary: You became wealthy, but the trial collapsed due to the media circus. The child was sent to another foster home, feeling betrayed by you.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize profit over the welfare of the child you set out to save.

endings.summary: You used the documentary to raise awareness without exploitation. The family was convicted, and you funded a shelter for abused children.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You balance financial gain with strict ethical boundaries to protect the vulnerable.

endings.summary: You adopted the child. You retired from social work to focus on raising them, providing the loving home they deserved.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You dedicate your personal life entirely to the healing of those you've saved.

title: The Broadcast
core_conflict: Public's right to know vs Preventing panic

nodes.text: You are a lead anchor for a national network. Two minutes before air, your producer hands you confirmed intelligence of a dirty bomb hidden in the city center. Homeland Security immediately calls, ordering you to suppress the story to prevent a lethal stampede.

choices.text: Agree with Homeland Security and hide the story.
Refuse and tell your cameraman to start broadcasting immediately.

nodes.text: You go live with the regular news. Meanwhile, your cameraman, furious, turns on his personal livestream to broadcast the bomb threat to his followers.
nodes.pressure_context: The stream is gaining thousands of views.

choices.text: Have security physically tackle the cameraman to stop the stream.
Admit on live TV that the cameraman's stream is true.

nodes.text: You start broadcasting the bomb threat. The control room cuts your mic and switches to commercials. The producer screams that you are causing a panic.

choices.text: Use your phone to continue broadcasting live on social media.
Evacuate the building yourself to save your own life.

nodes.text: The stream is stopped, but the rumor is out. People start rushing the subways, exactly what the government feared.

choices.text: Broadcast an official denial to try and calm the public.
Stay silent and watch the city burn.

nodes.text: You confess on air. The producer fires you immediately, but the city gets a clear, coordinated evacuation message.

choices.text: Leave quietly, knowing you did the right thing.
Refuse to leave the desk and lock the door.

nodes.text: You stream from your phone. Millions tune in. The government agents arrive at the studio to arrest you for inciting mass hysteria.

choices.text: Surrender to the agents on stream.
Run from the agents while streaming the chase.

nodes.text: You flee the studio. The bomb is detonated safely by the bomb squad, but your cowardice is caught on tape.

choices.text: Release an apology video.
Go off the grid completely.

nodes.text: Just padding an extra node for the structure.
You broadcast the official denial. The public panic slows down, but a local journalist produces a recording of your producer admitting to the cover-up.
nodes.pressure_context: A caller demands to know if you lied.

choices.text: Double down on the denial on live television.
Break down and apologize to the viewers live.

nodes.text: You stay silent. The city turns into chaos. The broadcast signals cut out as the station's backup generators fail.

choices.text: Lock yourself in the booth.
Grab the station's emergency megaphone and go outside.

nodes.text: You pack your things and walk out. The streets are busy but orderly as people evacuate. Your producer watches you leave, silent.
nodes.pressure_context: A government sedan is waiting outside.

choices.text: Get in the vehicle.
Slip away into the crowd.

nodes.text: You lock the studio door and keep broadcasting instructions on how to evacuate safely. Security begins to hammer on the glass.

choices.text: Keep reading the instructions until they break in.
Slip out of the side exit before they breach.

nodes.text: You raise your hands as the agents enter, your phone still streaming live. The agent raises his hand to cover the camera.
nodes.pressure_context: He commands you to turn it off.

choices.text: Turn the phone off and comply.
Refuse and throw the phone to your producer.

nodes.text: You run down the stairwell, streaming the chase. The agents' heavy boots echo close behind.
nodes.pressure_context: A locked fire door blocks your way.

choices.text: Try to kick the door open.
Hide in the janitor's closet and stop the stream.

nodes.text: You release your apology video. The internet reacts with mockery, calling you a coward. Your former sponsors threaten to sue.
nodes.pressure_context: A rival network offers you an interview.

choices.text: Accept the interview to defend yourself.
Decline the interview and retire from public life.

nodes.text: You pack a bag and head into the mountains, changing your name. Months pass, and you live in a quiet cabin.

choices.text: Deny your identity.
Invite them in to tell your side of the story.

endings.summary: You lied to the public to prevent a panic. You became a government mouthpiece, sacrificing your journalistic integrity.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize order and authority over truth.

endings.summary: You did nothing as panic swept the city. Your inaction resulted in dozens of stampede deaths.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You become paralyzed when conflicting authorities strip your agency.

endings.summary: You sacrificed your career to warn the city properly. You saved thousands of lives.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You value the truth above your own livelihood.

endings.summary: You were arrested on a live stream, becoming a martyr for free speech and truth.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You boldly face the consequences of defying the state.

endings.summary: You turned a national crisis into a personal chase scene, further fueling public hysteria.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You thrive on chaos and personal attention over structured resolution.

endings.summary: You fled out of fear. Your career is ruined, remembered only as the coward who ran.
endings.behavioral_analysis: Self-preservation is your only instinct when death is imminent.

endings.summary: You confessed to lying under government pressure. You lost your job but regained some respect from the public.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You fold under exposure, choosing truth only when your lies are uncovered.

endings.summary: You went out onto the streets to try and coordinate the crowd manually. You were injured, but saved several citizens.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You act heroically when the structure of your profession collapses.

endings.summary: You avoided the government agents and went into hiding, celebrated by the public as the anchor who saved the city.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You know when to make a stand and when to slip away to preserve your liberty.

endings.summary: You stayed on air until the security team dragged you away. You were hailed as a hero, and the evacuation was a complete success.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize public service to the point of personal capture.

endings.summary: You broadcasted until the last moment, then escaped. You saved the city and avoided immediate arrest.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You maximize utility by completing the broadcast and avoiding capture.

endings.summary: You kept the footage online. You were arrested, but the video of your arrest went viral, sparking nationwide protests.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You use media leverage to challenge state authority even during arrest.

endings.summary: You hid and escaped the building, but your stream ended abruptly, leaving the public confused and panicked.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize your immediate safety when cornered, abandoning the narrative.

endings.summary: You faded away, living a quiet, shameful life under an assumed name.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You choose total withdrawal when public pressure becomes unmanageable.

endings.summary: You convinced the hiker they were mistaken. You continue to live a lonely but peaceful life in exile.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize total privacy and safety over public opinion.

endings.summary: You shared your story, which was published as a sympathetic article. You found partial redemption.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You seek connection and redemption even in isolation.

nodes.text: You are the Governor. A death row inmate is scheduled to die in 48 hours. A leaked DNA report proves his innocence, but the victim's family is your biggest political donor, and your Attorney General refuses to admit the state was wrong.

choices.text: Issue an immediate executive pardon to save the innocent man.
Sign the execution warrant to secure your reelection.

nodes.text: You issue the pardon. The victim's family publicly withdraws their support, launching a smear campaign that will guarantee you lose the upcoming election.

choices.text: Hold a press conference and expose the Attorney General's corruption.
Resign from office gracefully to avoid further scandal.

choices.text: Blame the Attorney General for hiding the evidence from you.
Order the police to disperse the protesters with tear gas.

nodes.text: You expose the corruption. The AG is indicted, but your party disowns you entirely.

choices.text: Embrace the exile and write a tell-all book.
Run as an independent candidate.

Face trial and accept your punishment.

choices.text: Accept the tour and face the threats.

choices.text: Tell them you did what was necessary.

choices.text: Bribery is your only way out.

nodes.pressure_context: Your lawyer recommends taking the deal.

Accept the deal and name names.

nodes.pressure_context: A small group of protesters refuses to disperse.

choices.text: Order the Guard to clear them using lethal force if necessary.
Order the Guard to hold their positions and negotiate a curfew extension.

nodes.pressure_context: A rock chips the stone next to you.

choices.text: Apologize and promise a full investigation into the AG's office.
Defend the state's legal process and refuse to apologize.

endings.behavioral_analysis: You are willing to burn bridges to ensure total justice.

endings.summary: You chose a quiet exit. You saved a life, but allowed the rotten system to endure.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You avoid messy conflicts, preferring clean, if incomplete, resolutions.

endings.summary: You fled like a coward after murdering an innocent man for political gain.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You are entirely self-serving and completely devoid of moral integrity.

endings.summary: You went to prison for your crimes. A grim end for a corrupt politician.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You eventually accepted responsibility, but only after causing irreversible harm.

endings.summary: You became a dictator of your own state, drowning a righteous protest in blood.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You escalate violence to maintain power and control.

endings.behavioral_analysis: You challenge the judiciary directly, risking your license and your client's case.

endings.summary: You were arrested at the airport and extradited, facing even harsher charges for fleeing.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You attempt to flee but surrender when cornered.

endings.behavioral_analysis: You cooperate with justice only when it serves to reduce your own penalty.

endings.summary: You managed to de-escalate the tension without further bloodshed, though you are politically ruined.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You prioritize restoring order without escalating to absolute violence.

endings.summary: Your apology mollified the crowd, but you were forced to resign under pressure the next day.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You accept responsibility publicly to prevent violence.

endings.summary: The crowd stormed the mansion gates. You were evacuated by security, leaving the city in total anarchy.
endings.behavioral_analysis: You defend the establishment even as it burns down around you.

nodes.text: You are a hostage negotiator. Terrorists hold 30 civilians in a bank, demanding the release of a convicted mass bomber. If released, intelligence guarantees the bomber will strike again. A tactical team is ready to breach, but they only have a 60% chance of saving everyone.
nodes.pressure_context: The terrorist leader is on the line.

choices.text: Agree to release the bomber to save the 30 hostages.
Order the tactical team to breach immediately.

nodes.text: The bomber is released. True to his word, the terrorist leader begins releasing the hostages. But your commander suddenly orders a drone strike on the bomber's transport, which will break the deal and likely get the remaining hostages killed.

choices.text: Jam the drone's signal to ensure the trade completes.
Allow the drone strike to proceed.

nodes.text: The tactical team breaches. Gunfire erupts. The commander radios in: 'Heavy resistance. Hostages are in the crossfire. Do we push through or fall back?'

choices.text: Order them to push through and eliminate the targets at all costs.
Order them to fall back and try to reopen negotiations.

nodes.text: You jammed the signal. The hostages are fully released, and the bomber escapes. You are arrested for treason.

choices.text: Go to prison knowing you saved 30 people.
Flee before they can arrest you.

nodes.text: The drone obliterates the bomber. Inside the bank, the terrorists immediately execute ten hostages before the tactical team kills them.

choices.text: Justify it as a necessary mathematical sacrifice.
Resign in protest of the commander's drone strike order.

nodes.text: The team pushes through. The terrorists are killed, but 12 hostages die in the crossfire.

choices.text: Write up the report praising the tactical team.
Launch an internal investigation into the team's excessive force.

nodes.text: The team falls back. The terrorist leader gets back on the phone, laughing. He executes a hostage while you listen.

choices.text: Beg him to stop.
Order the second breach, knowing it will be a slaughter.

nodes.text: Filler node.
You are locked in a high-security military prison. Years pass. The bomber you released strikes a civilian target, killing hundreds.
nodes.pressure_context: A guard shows you the news.

choices.text: Accept your sentence as the price for the 30 lives.
Hang your head in regret, admitting you made a mistake.

choices.text: Try to talk your way through.

Settle with the families out of court.
